text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The concert has come to an end, and<n>the stage is
all cleaned up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission complete.

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bourbon! You were so cool on<n>stage!

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Really, you were just so... so<n>amazing, and... I'm
going to work<n>hard! Harder than I ever have!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Why are you crying?

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Because your performance... was<n>just so
emotional.

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text: I could feel your drive to be the best<n>you can be!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Sounds like you conveyed your emotions.
Sounds like you conveyed your emotions.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Bourbon, your performance today<n>was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What new trick did you pick up?<n>C'mon, spill the
beans!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I executed the command "convey."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My objective was to put feelings into<n>my singing,
just like I'd seen you do<n>before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Do you think I succeeded?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you did! You succeeded big<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right, FalFal Gauge powered up!<n>We're just
getting started, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna deliver joy and<n>gratitude and ALL
the bestest feelings<n>to our fans! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Affirmative.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to raising awareness, it<n>looks like these
concerts are helping<n>the girls grow as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pleased by this development, I turn<n>my focus to
thinking about our next<n>steps, when...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you hear what they said about<n>the Grand
Concert? Think we can<n>join too?!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: I dunno, but I need it! I want to singso bad! You think they'll let us do"Next Frontier"? It'd be a dreamcome true!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
A concert that anyone can perform<n>in? I don't
know about that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hear a chorus of impressions from<n>the crowd.
